summary: Auth system testing completed. Backend: 13/13 tests PASSED. Frontend: All auth flows verified via Playwright. Fixed bug in logout endpoint (wasn't reading token from Authorization header). All auth features working correctly.
passed_tests: BACKEND: Health check endpoint returns healthy status
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/signup creates user and returns token
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/signup returns 400 for duplicate email
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/login returns token for valid credentials
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/login returns 401 for invalid password
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/login returns 401 for non-existent email
BACKEND: GET /api/auth/me returns user with valid token
BACKEND: GET /api/auth/me returns 401 without token
BACKEND: GET /api/auth/me returns 401 with invalid token
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/logout clears session (token no longer valid)
BACKEND: Snapshots are isolated per user (User A cannot see User B's snapshots)
BACKEND: GET /api/snapshots/{id} works without auth (for shared links)
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/google endpoint exists (returns 401 for invalid session)
FRONTEND: Auth page shown when not logged in (data-testid='auth-page')
FRONTEND: Google login button exists (data-testid='google-login-btn')
FRONTEND: Toggle between login/signup modes (data-testid='auth-toggle-mode')
FRONTEND: Email input exists (data-testid='auth-email-input')
FRONTEND: Password input exists (data-testid='auth-password-input')
FRONTEND: Name input appears in signup mode (data-testid='auth-name-input')
FRONTEND: Submit button shows 'Sign In' in login mode, 'Create Account' in signup mode
FRONTEND: Signup creates user and redirects to main app
FRONTEND: User name shown in header after login (data-testid='user-name')
FRONTEND: Logout button exists (data-testid='logout-btn')
FRONTEND: Logout returns to auth page
FRONTEND: Error message shown for wrong password (data-testid='auth-error')
FRONTEND: Session persists after page reload (localStorage token)
FRONTEND: Shared link (?snapshot=) loads without requiring login
FRONTEND: View-only banner shown for shared links (data-testid='view-only-banner')
FRONTEND: Save/Share buttons hidden in view-only mode
FRONTEND: Exit View-Only button exists (data-testid='exit-view-only-btn')
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIXED: Logout endpoint was only reading token from cookies, not Authorization header. Fixed in server.py line 251-262.
Auth implementation uses localStorage token (key: 'automl_token') for iframe compatibility.
Session tokens are stored in MongoDB 'user_sessions' collection with 7-day expiry.
Passwords are hashed with bcrypt before storage.
Google OAuth uses Emergent's auth.emergentagent.com endpoint (cannot be tested automatically).
Snapshot GET endpoint has NO auth required (for sharing), but list/create/delete require auth.
Per-user isolation: Snapshots are filtered by user_id in list endpoint.
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (fixed logout to read token from Authorization header)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed users and snapshots during testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth system fully tested. Key findings: 1) Token stored in localStorage as 'automl_token'. 2) Backend endpoints: POST /api/auth/signup, POST /api/auth/login, GET /api/auth/me, POST /api/auth/logout, POST /api/auth/google. 3) All endpoints accept Authorization: Bearer <token> header. 4) Shared links (?snapshot=id) work without auth. 5) Per-user snapshot isolation verified. 6) Google OAuth uses Emergent's auth.emergentagent.com (cannot be tested automatically).
rca_of_the_issue: BUG FIXED: The logout endpoint (POST /api/auth/logout) was only reading the session token from cookies (request.cookies.get('session_token')), but the frontend uses localStorage and sends the token via Authorization header. Fixed by adding fallback to read from Authorization header when cookie is not present.
